    • common/interfaces
    • BarChartConfig

    Interface BarChartConfig

    Full configuration for the bar chart. All fields are required; the Builder provides sensible defaults.

    interface BarChartConfig {
        axisColor: string;
        backgroundColor: string;
        barColor: string;
        gridColor: string;
        margin: Margin;
        numGridLines: number;
        textColor: string;
        title: string;
        titleColor: string;
        xAxisLabel: string;
        yAxisLabel: string;
    }
    • Defined in common/interfaces.ts:34
